title: phaenopyrum melanocarpum
intro: Phaenopyrum melanocarpum, also known as the Black Fruit tree or Black Staphylocarp, is a plant species native to China, belonging to the family Rutaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaenopyrum melanocarpum include its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Herbal preparations of Phaenopyrum melanocarpum include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
